title: Knocker Boys YTPMV (kinda)
description:
Kind of a filler. Previously uploaded on my alt.
Sounds more like a remix or something rather than an YTPMV (well as if an YTPMV weren't a remix itself)
I wanted to YTPMV Tricks upon Travellers' version but then I ended up mixing both the original and the chiptune one and improvising a bit, and well here is the result!
